projects.title: Philippines Building Code Evidence Auditor V2
projects.owner_intent: Audit public earthquake evidence for specific Philippine buildings without overclaiming safety or compliance.
projects.current_goal: Keep the V2 evidence-auditor workflow testable, source-bounded, and gated by exact building identity.

workstreams.objective: Maintain the Philippine building earthquake evidence audit workflow.
workstreams.next_action: Confirm exact building identity before permit, contractor, incident, code, compliance, earthquake, or safety search.

projects.title: Agent Workflow Project Maker
projects.owner_intent: Create reusable ECC workflow project packs and manage generated repo work.
projects.current_goal: Build the control repo tracker and project creation workflow.

workstreams.objective: Build a tracker for projects, repos, sessions, and GitHub upload state.
open_decisions: Decide whether command shims should live under commands/.
workstreams.next_action: Continue implementing upload gate, daily rollup, and repo audit.

workflow_runs.title: Implement issue 9 skills-first slash workflow surface
workflow_runs.next_action: Use the workflow router intake surface for future workflow bugs and new workflow requests.
workflow_runs.decision: End grilling for the workflow-router contract and move to PRD synthesis. The accepted contract covers immediate workflow creation, workflow-specific loaded intake, visible ECC proof, context manifest, premise lock, informed grilling, scaffold behavior, and GitHub-pushed durability.
workflow_runs.final_summary: Implemented ECC-loaded workflow intake router, slash compatibility surface, scaffold planning, and upload closeout safety for PRD #11.
validation_results: python3 -m unittest tests.test_workflow_run_commands tests.test_validate_tracker tests.test_tracker_runtime: passed

workflow_runs.title: Create Astro tracker monitor workflow and UI
workflow_runs.next_action: Ask the first context-aware grilling question for the Tracker Astro Monitor workflow.
workflow_runs.waiting_reason: Need user confirmation of workflow contract before continuing implementation.
workflow_runs.decision: Do not continue implementation until the tracker monitor workflow contract is grilled and accepted.

workflow_runs.title: Enforce workflow router compliance instead of relying on memory
workflow_runs.next_action: Use validate_tracker.py as the enforcement gate before continuing, closing, or uploading workflow bug work.
workflow_runs.final_summary: Implemented fail-closed tracker validation so workflow_intake and workflow_specific_bug runs require context manifests with ECC proof before tracker validation can pass.
